items.title: Presentation: From OTEL to SLMs: Distilling Frontier Model Behaviour from Production Telemetry
items.summaryShort: Presentation: From OTEL to SLMs: Distilling Frontier Model Behaviour from Production Telemetry. Ben O'Mahony discusses building custom AI-powered Language Server Protocols (LSPs) that go beyond standard rule-based checkers.

items.title: How Uber Builds Zone-Failure-Resilient OpenSearch Clusters
items.summaryShort: How Uber Builds Zone-Failure-Resilient OpenSearch Clusters. Uber explained how it keeps its OpenSearch deployments running during a zone outage.

items.title: QCon AI Boston: Production AI Moves Beyond Prompts to Platforms, Harnesses, and Evals
items.summaryShort: QCon AI Boston: Production AI Moves Beyond Prompts to Platforms, Harnesses, and Evals. QCon AI Boston 2026 focused on the operational challenges of deploying AI agents, emphasizing the need for robust production infrastructure.

items.title: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
items.summaryShort: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal. A $400 million chip-backed loan points to the next wave of AI infrastructure deals.

items.title: SpaceX suddenly aborts second Starship V3 launch after ignition
items.summaryShort: SpaceX suddenly aborts second Starship V3 launch after ignition. The company didn't immediately say what went wrong.
